audit-version-command.description: CLI command that audits a completed milestone for gaps between planned requirements and actual delivery. Produces .planning/v{version}-AUDIT.md.

audit-report-artifact.description: Markdown gap report listing covered requirements, uncovered requirements, partially completed items, and recommended remediation actions.

state-json.description: Read milestone and set status to determine completion state

roadmap.description: Read planned scope per set for comparison against delivery

requirements.description: Read acceptance criteria for traceability verification

add-set-command.description: Existing command used for remediation when gaps are found

read-only-state.description: Audit-version NEVER mutates STATE.json. It is a read-only analysis command. Remediation is deferred to /rapid:add-set invoked by the user.

milestone-completion-check.description: Milestone completion is derived from sets.every(s => s.status === 'merged'), not from a milestone-level status field

context-limit-safety.description: For milestones with 5+ sets, use a two-pass approach: summary scan first, then targeted deep-dive on flagged sets

definition.scope: New /rapid:audit-version command that reads milestone artifacts, cross-references planned requirements against actual delivery, produces a gap report (.planning/v{version}-AUDIT.md), and offers to plan remediation sets via /rapid:add-set or defer items to next version with written context. Read-only against state; never mutates STATE.json.

tasks.description: Create skills/audit-version/SKILL.md with full audit workflow
Add display.cjs banner entry for audit stage
Implement gap analysis logic (requirements vs delivery)
tasks.acceptance: Audit correctly identifies covered, uncovered, and partial requirements

tasks.description: Implement remediation offer via /rapid:add-set or defer to next version
tasks.acceptance: User can choose to create remediation sets for gaps or defer items with written context

acceptance: STATE.json is never mutated by audit
Remediation offered via /rapid:add-set for identified gaps
Deferral option writes carry-forward context for next version
Two-pass approach used for milestones with 5+ sets
